DISES Midline2
Knowledge module results

Author

as4538@cornell.edu

This document presents summary statistics for the Knowledge Module from DISES Midline 2 (January 2026).

Results are reported at three levels of aggregation:

  1. Treatment-arm level
  2. Village level
  3. Detailed answer distributions (village x question)

Notes

  • Percentages represent the share of households providing the correct response.
  • For multiple-choice questions, the percentage correct reflects the proportion of correctly identified response options.

1. Treatment-level results

The table below summarizes knowledge outcomes at the treatment-arm level. Values are reported as mean percentage correct across villages within each treatment arm.

2. Village-level results

The table below presents knowledge outcomes at the village level. Use the drop-down menus below to locate specific villages or treatment-arms.

3. Detailed village x question statistics

Use the drop-down menus below to display detailed response distributions for a selected village and question. The table will filter according to selection.
